name: Nodens
description: Personal strategic HQ: Next.js web + Node API + Postgres, running as the nodens-live Docker Compose stack.

migration.rollback: Keep /home/oreo/nodens intact. If the compose stack fails, run docker compose -p nodens-live -f /home/oreo/nodens/deploy/compose.yml -f /home/oreo/nodens/deploy/docker-compose.override.local.yml up -d after reviewing env and health.
notes: Running as Docker Compose project nodens-live from /home/oreo/nodens/deploy/compose.yml with a local override.
web and api are bound to 127.0.0.1 only; tailnet access is provided separately through Tailscale Serve.
Postgres is not published on a host port and uses the nodens-live_postgres-data named volume.
Canonical Oreo Cloud source migration into /srv/oreo-cloud/workloads/nodens/source is still pending.

requirements: No backup execution allowed until personal-data classification and credential rotation are reviewed.
Postgres is now on the nodens-live_postgres-data named volume; define and test dump/restore commands before enabling backup automation.

notes: Handles personal life, work, relationship, and risk data per the project README.
web and api bind to 127.0.0.1 only; tailnet access is mediated by Tailscale Serve.
Postgres is not published on a host port in the nodens-live Compose stack.
